title: Ferris Wheel
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}
[[File:FerrisWheel.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The proposed Ferris Wheel.]]
The '''Ferris Wheel''' was a proposed attraction that was meant to be on the surface of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. It had viewpoints "second only to the [[Imperial throne room (Death Star I)|Emperor's Observation Tower]]." The large wheel was designed to delight various members in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], from [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]].<ref name="DSD">''[[Death Star Designer]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Leland Chee]] has stated that, while most items, like the [[supercoaster]] and Ferris Wheel are entered for fun, much of the other information is included in the [[Holocron continuity database]], and is [[canon]], at least to the [[Legends]] continuity. The inclusion of the Ferris Wheel is a nod to [[Wikipedia:Thrillville|''Thrillville'']], another [[LucasArts]] game unrelated to ''[[Star Wars]]''.<ref name="Chee">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1075#16045442|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-13|time=4:49 PM}}</ref>
